title: Lay Down Behavior
description: Allows mobs to lay down at times

interval.title: Interval
interval.description: A random value to determine at what intervals something can occur. This has a 1/interval chance to choose this goal

random_stop_interval.title: Random Stop Interval
random_stop_interval.description: a random value in which the goal can use to pull out of the behavior. This is a 1/interval chance to play the sound

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
